scope: Documentation-only release. No SQL changes. SQL_REFERENCE and USAGE updated to document three GUCs shipped in v0.9.2–v0.9.3.
justification: No SQL, schema, or scoring changes. Identical extension SQL to v0.9.3. All recall paths, GUC behaviors, and test assertions unchanged.
verification: No new tests needed. All existing REGRESS tests carry forward from v0.9.3 (local installcheck verified).
